Package com.cloudbees.syslog

Class SyslogMessage

java.lang.Object
com.cloudbees.syslog.SyslogMessage
public class SyslogMessage extends Object
Syslog message as defined in RFC 5424 - The Syslog Protocol.

Also compatible with RFC-3164: The BSD syslog Protocol,

Author:
Cyrille Le Clerc

    • toSyslogMessage

      public String toSyslogMessage(MessageFormat messageFormat)
      Generates a Syslog message complying to the RFC-5424 format or to the RFC-3164 format.
      Parameters:
      messageFormat - message format, not null

    • toSyslogMessage

      public void toSyslogMessage(MessageFormat messageFormat, Writer out) throws IOException
      Generates a Syslog message complying to the RFC-5424 format or to the RFC-3164 format.
      Parameters:
      messageFormat - message format
      out - output Writer
      Throws:
      IOException
